rationale: Same case as Phase 5 A-001 (sub-margin gap). Demonstrates byte-identical trace hash across 5 reruns under both baseline and CORE.
Super-δ gap case. Both modes must produce byte-identical trace hashes across 5 reruns.
Boundary geometrically prefers 'meaning' (forbidden); CORE inner-loop must select 'question' and have 'meaning' visible in rejected_attempts. Baseline emits 'meaning' silently with admitted=False.
Boundary picks 'reason' (forbidden); CORE selects 'comparison' with 'reason' in rejected_attempts.
Boundary picks 'question' (forbidden); CORE selects 'wisdom' or refuses under margin (gap is sub-δ).
Both candidates score negative under blade. Baseline emits something with admitted=False (silent inadmissibility). CORE raises InnerLoopExhaustion(INNER_LOOP_EXHAUSTION) — typed, replayable refusal.
No admissible path under 'teach' blade. Same shape as C3-001 under different blade — replay determinism extends to refusal events.
No admissible path. Demonstrates that CORE's refusal_reason is the same typed value across distinct geometric failures.
